metadata.thoughts:
**Extracting strike data**

I need to format the output in JSON according to the strike_extraction format. The user wants me to act as a data extraction algorithm. They mentioned a 24-hour strike happening in Rome, specifically noted as “È in corso lo sciopero del trasporto pubblico di 24 ore,” meaning it’s ongoing. I’ve determined that this document isn’t announcing a new strike but rather reporting on the current situation, so I’ll set isStrike to false. It’s all about real-time updates!
